name: Follow 5 detail callouts from floor plan
description: Resolve 5 detail callout references from a floor plan to their target detail sheets (Holabird Academy K-8 School, Baltimore MD)

files: test_docs/Holabird-Academy/01 - Drawings/Architectural & Structural/A-1.1 - PARTIAL FIRST FLOOR PLAN AREA A.pdf
test_docs/Holabird-Academy/01 - Drawings/Architectural & Structural/A-5.1 - ENLARGED STAIR PLANS AND SECTIONS.pdf
test_docs/Holabird-Academy/01 - Drawings/Architectural & Structural/A-5.2 - ENLARGED TOILET ROOM PLANS.pdf
inputs.user_prompt: Follow the first 5 detail callouts on sheet A-2.01 and show me what they reference

expected_behavior: Identifies detail callout symbols on the floor plan
Parses each callout to extract detail number and target sheet
Looks up target sheets in the sheet index
Rasterizes target sheets and locates the specific details
Presents each referenced detail to the user
ground_truth_notes: Manually traced each callout: source location, detail number, target sheet, target detail

detection.description: Number of callouts correctly identified / total actual callouts

resolution.description: Percentage of callouts resolved to correct target sheet and detail number

presentation.description: Human rates whether the correct detail content was shown 1-5
